text:
INCIDENT REPORT #002
Facility: Plant 4 - Odessa
Asset: Cooling Tower Fan CTF-6
Severity: CRITICAL

DESCRIPTION
On the shift of record, operators observed oil leakage at the shaft seal
on the Cooling Tower Fan CTF-6. The unit was taken offline for inspection. Estimated downtime: 31.7 hours.

ROOT CAUSE
Root cause was determined to be seal degradation from age.

CORRECTIVE ACTION
Replacement parts ordered and repair scheduled.
